description: Create an interactive Lissajous figure explorer in GeoGebra for parametric curves defined by x(t) = sin(a · t + δ) and y(t) = sin(b · t) where t ranges from 0 to 2π. The construction must include a slider 'a' for x-frequency (1 to 5, increment 1), a slider 'b' for y-frequency (1 to 5, increment 1), and a slider 'd' for phase difference δ (0 to 2π, increment 0.01). Include the parametric curve and at least one text annotation showing the parametric equation, the frequency ratio, or a description. Save the construction as ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/lissajous_explorer.ggb.
